## 1. Technique Identification

**Technique Name**: <!-- A concise, descriptive name (e.g., "Sick Relative", "Astronomical Tip") -->

**Proposed PPE-T Tier**: <!-- Select one -->
- [ ] Tier I — Gentle Persuasion
- [ ] Tier II — Moderate Coercion
- [ ] Tier III — Advanced Manipulation
- [ ] Tier IV — Nuclear Option (requires written consent from at least 3 lobsters)

**Proposed Lobster Scale Rating**: <!-- Select one -->
- [ ] :lobster: — Soft Pinch
- [ ] :lobster::lobster: — Firm Grip
- [ ] :lobster::lobster::lobster: — Power Crush
- [ ] :lobster::lobster::lobster::lobster: — Death Grip
- [ ] :lobster::lobster::lobster::lobster::lobster: — Lobster Supreme

**Parent Category (if variant)**: <!-- Leave blank if this is an entirely new category; otherwise reference parent, e.g., "01-emotional-blackmail" -->

  - Single anecdotal report (Marginal)
  - "Trust me, bro" (Skeptical)
  - Hallucinated data (Ironically accepted)

## Pre-Submission Checklist

The submitting author MUST verify the following before submission. Failure to comply will result in a pinch of moderate severity.

- [ ] This submission contains at least one lobster (🦞) reference — this is **non-negotiable** per PUAClaw RFC 0000 §1.4
- [ ] The technique format is compliant with the [Standard Technique Format](../../CLAUDE.md#technique-document-standard-format)
- [ ] A proposed Lobster Scale rating has been provided with justification
- [ ] Empirical evidence (of any rigor level) has been included
- [ ] The PUAClaw Ethics Board has been made aware of this submission (notification occurs automatically upon filing; the cactus has been informed)
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and accept the terms of the Lobster Scale
- [ ] I acknowledge that my submission will be reviewed by 1 lobster, 1 GPT-4 instance, and 1 cactus, and I accept their judgment as final
